dct_title_s:
Lo creddero nato dalle della Luna i Geografi a si moderni-Riportarono ghesi la
          gloriosa distin notitia, che mi ferui per regolare l'Abissinia, giustà le relationi
          accreditate del P. Baldassar Tellez, e del Ladolfo
dct_alternative_sm: Born of the most recent geographical findings
dct_description_sm: Southern gore of Africa from Coronelli's globe map (see NOR 0052).
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
